name: /pr-corpus-update budget resets at the configured day-rollover boundary not on each invocation
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"cfpb-consumerfinance":{"used_today":99000,"date":"2026-05-12"}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --estimated-tokens 5000 --budget .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json --now 2026-05-13T00:00:01Z --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'budget_reset=true' out.txt && grep -q 'used_today=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
